analysis.reasoning: Core message: The Russian Ambassador to South Africa highlights deep Russia–South Africa ties, not only via BRICS and the UN, but also through shared sacrifices ('bound by blood shed for common aims'), during a commemorative flower-laying ceremony. Evaluation per narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile): Not mentioned; no criticism of the West. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system): BRICS and UN are referenced, but only to say ties go beyond these frameworks; it does not portray Russia leading an alternative order or advocate a multipolar alternative explicitly. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner): The tweet underscores solidarity, shared struggle, and enduring partnership, portraying Russia as a reliable, value-based partner to South Africa—this fits. RU4 (Russian history admirable): While there is reference to shared sacrifices, it is not a broader celebration of Russian historical achievements; focus is bilateral ties, not admiring Russian history per se. RU5 (Russia at the forefront): No claims of superiority or current achievements. RU6 (Interesting culture/nature/heritage): Not cultural or touristic content. Conclusion: Only RU3 applies.
